meaning: n.巴比伦,奢华淫靡的城市,任何大的富庶的或罪恶的城市
examples: Egypt and Babylon were both tyrannies, one very powerful man ruling over helpless masses.
I explored the Roman Empire, Babylon, the times of Noah, and Abraham. Any era you can name, I went there.
It also has an amazing history, in Babylon around 2800 B.C., the earliest known soap was made and used.
Pale tufted plants line massive rising terraces, evoking but predating the hanging gardens of Babylon.
Yet remnants of Babylon's former glory remain, with sections of the city's walls still intact.
